expectations.evidence: Logo area uses var(--bg-glass-strong) and var(--blur-glass). Card surface delegated to .c-glass-card engine. Zero raw hex values.
var(--border-default) and var(--border-focus) — no hex colors
var(--color-text-main), var(--color-text-muted), var(--color-primary), var(--color-primary-hover) — zero hardcoded colors
Header: 'Engine: .c-glass-card (applied as HTML class on host element)'. Width set to 20rem (not 320px). Breakpoint uses $break-mobile.
padding-block, padding-inline, margin-block-end, margin-block-start, margin-block throughout every selector
